So, the key to your success with achieving your vision is the personal why, having the personal why, and then you mentioned sharing the vision. Can you tell us more about that sharing your vision with the people around you? Yeah, well there's two aspects to that. One is sharing it for the purpose of self-motivation. In other words, if you almost embarrass yourself into taking action, you tell the four people, you know, I'm going to do this and you have no choice, well I got to do it now because I look like a schmuck in everyone's eyes. That's one aspect. A different aspect and probably a more important aspect. I want to say, let's say not more important, just a very important aspect would be that you need to learn how to share your vision for the future in a way that inspires other people to actually buy into your vision. If I had tried to go out there and achieve what I achieved in the last five years in the global speaking circuit and then in the markets and everything else in corporate, in the corporate world, if I try to do that as a one person army, no way. I would have never been able to achieve that. But what happened was when I met people, I needed to help me get what I want, I was able to tell them about my vision and I was able to communicate my vision in a way that was so inspiring to them that I had all the people jump on board and help me achieve my vision and they worked for far less and they would have worked for someone else because they just would have said, wow, they're thirsty. I started off and said, every human being is thirsty for a vision and so few have one. So what do they do? They gravitate, they essentially will buy into someone else's. Understanding at the highest level how to share your vision with other people around you so they want to jump on board and help you make your vision a reality. Well, that's on many levels, what the straight line is about. It's the same tactics, the same techniques, the same processes that essentially allow you to create certainty in the people around you. They become certain about your vision, certain that you're a person they want to be involved with, certain about the entity that you're building. It's the same thing, the same three tens as I speak about in the straight line. So my ability to attract great people to help me get what I want in life and give them hopefully what they want to. Well, that's equally important in terms of being able to share a vision just not with my daughter or someone to help me inspire myself but to get other people inspired to make this a reality. That's the highest level.
